name: forensic-deepdive
summary: Forensic deep-dive of any codebase (9 languages). Persistent code knowledge graph + MCP server (9 composite tools incl. hybrid NL query, Mermaid export & cross-stack trace) for AI coding agents, with 5 durable markdown artifacts (MAP, HOTPATHS, ARCHAEOLOGY, MENTAL_MODEL, AGENT_BRIEF) as the human-readable projection.
author: Dhevenddra
